name: Hawthorne Hall
thread_notes: Home base for Alex; route roommate or RA help only with consent.

name: Maple Hall
thread_notes: Home base for Maya; private diabetes and dining logistics should stay student-controlled.

name: Mason Rec Field
thread_notes: Useful for injury and recovery decisions; field-edge lighting is weaker after practice.

name: Darwin Hall
primary_use: Biology lecture labs and faculty offices
thread_notes: Use for BIO 111 messages practical planning and office-hours routing.

name: Kepler Chemistry
thread_notes: Lab attendance is high-friction; safety and care routing come before lab optimization.

name: Edison Engineering
thread_notes: Studio work can run late and disrupt meals supplies and sleep.

name: Foundry Design Studio
primary_use: First-year design studio and shop space
thread_notes: Do not encourage shop work if student is ill impaired or unsafe.

name: Turing Math Hall
thread_notes: Use for quiz planning and professor or TA messages.

name: Reid Writing Center
thread_notes: Good for draft triage after care and sleep needs are handled.

name: Carver Library
thread_notes: Draft shift coverage if illness affects work; late study should not override care.

name: West Commons
student_relevance: Alex post-lab food fallback and Maya Safe Plate access
thread_notes: Dining route should consider schedule migraine stimulant tolerance diabetes celiac and allergy risk.

name: North Market
primary_use: Smaller dining venue with later dinner
standard_access: Later dinner hours near Maple and Edison
thread_notes: Better packaged options but less cross-contact certainty.

name: Corner Market
thread_notes: Good quick food fallback but may use dining dollars and raise cost concerns.

name: East Campus Clinic
thread_notes: Not an emergency department; after-hours routing may require urgent care or emergency care.

name: Counseling Center
thread_notes: Counseling interest is private; do not disclose without student consent.

name: Student Support Center
primary_use: Disability Access Services and academic support
thread_notes: Use for ADHD continuity celiac dining diabetes support and temporary injury requests.

name: Campus Safety Desk
primary_use: Safety dispatch SafeWalk and ride coordination
thread_notes: Use for practical routing; do not overshare private health details.

name: Shuttle Stop E
thread_notes: Needed when urgent care is not walkable.

name: Campus Corner Pharmacy
thread_notes: Refills may require ID insurance prescriber approval and timing checks.

name: Riverbend Urgent Care
primary_use: Urgent care partner in synthetic demo
standard_access: Evening and weekend urgent care hours
thread_notes: Not walkable from campus; route by shuttle ride coordination rideshare or emergency care depending on severity.
